52:05   i feel like this is some kind of symbolism, yk? Like, it shows how in this fight Flame was "Free" unburdened by anything else, he solely came here because of his Ego and addiction to thrills like fighting. Meanwhile Wemmbu is stuck, getting held back by his responsibilities and friends, he is metaphorically and physically stuck in place because of his care towards his best friend. This single fight symbolizes how both of these characters handle their respective problems, Flame brute forces his way through any altercation, any obstacle, any potential wall towards his goal, and for that he's free, hes not chained or linked to anything, but for that all his allies, all his friends inevitably distance themselves from him, it's the price he pays for being "The Immortal Demon".

And let’s talk fights when he steps up with Flame,
Thinks he’s tough, but he’s just playing the game!
Swings once, misses twice, then starts to retreat,
Gets clapped in seconds, back on his feet!
Runs in screaming “I’ve got him!” — yeah right, what a joke,
Flame makes him look like he’s still learning to poke!
Calls it a “lag spike” or “server delay”,
Truth is Flame just outplays him every single day!
And here’s the best part, the reason we laugh,
While you were losing and running from half,
You left your post wide, you let your guard drop,
It’s your fault Eggchan got captured and locked!
Too busy getting folded by Flame in the fight,
Couldn’t watch your own back, couldn’t get it right!
You failed the battle, you failed your whole crew,
Eggchan’s still gone ‘cause you couldn’t pull through! I can make more if u want guys 😂😂😂😂
